description.description: Description of the `primary` or the `associated` relationship

name.description: API name of the `primary` or the `associated` link. The `name` parameter can't start with a number and can only contain the following characters: `a-z`, `A-Z`,` 0-9`, and `_`.

title.description: Display name of the `primary` or the `associated` link

type.description: The object type for this relationship

description.description: Description of the `primary` or the `associated` relationship

name.description: API name of the `primary` or the `associated` link. The `name` parameter can't start with a number and can only contain the following characters: `a-z`, `A-Z`,` 0-9`, and `_`.

title.description: Display name of the `primary` or the `associated` link

type.description: The object type for this relationship

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available for the current status of an application using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.
